sentences.text: Checkpoints: a safety net you didn't set up
With a static site, a bad change shows up as a page that looks broken.
With an app, a wrong change can quietly break behavior you only notice when you actually use it.
So before big changes, Claude Code already protects you.
Every time you send a prompt, it takes a checkpoint — a snapshot of your project from just before that change.
These happen automatically; you don't create them, you just know a recent version is almost always there to return to.
